vision: BioPulse is a next-generation biometric health dashboard designed to visualize complex physiological data through a futuristic, glassmorphic interface. The vision is to transform raw health metrics into actionable insights using a dark-mode aesthetic with neon green accents, ensuring a seamless, high-contrast user experience that feels like a HUD for the human body.

screens.title: Dashboard
screens.description: The central command center for the user's biometric health, displaying real-time vitals, daily activity summaries, and quick access to detailed metrics.
screens.prompt: Design a high-fidelity Dashboard for BioPulse featuring a real-time animated heart rate monitor using SVG waves, a circular progress ring for daily activity goals, and a glassmorphic card layout for quick health stats (Sleep, Hydration, Stress). The design must strictly adhere to the dark mode, neon green (#13ec6d) accent, and Inter font system.

screens.title: Body Metrics
screens.description: A detailed breakdown of body composition and physical statistics, including BMI, weight trends, and muscle mass distribution.
screens.prompt: Create a detailed Body Metrics screen with a large, interactive BMI gauge, a line chart showing weight trends over the last 30 days, and a breakdown of body composition percentages (Muscle, Fat, Water) using sleek progress bars with neon glow effects.

screens.title: Sleep Analysis
screens.description: An in-depth look at sleep quality, featuring sleep stages (REM, Deep, Light), sleep score, and recovery metrics.
screens.prompt: Design a Sleep Analysis screen featuring a sleep score circular indicator, a segmented bar chart representing sleep stages (REM, Deep, Light) throughout the night, and a 'Recovery' gauge showing physical and mental restoration levels.

screens.title: Workout Performance
screens.description: A performance tracking interface focused on workout intensity, heart rate zones, and caloric expenditure.
screens.prompt: Design a Workout Performance screen showing a live heart rate graph during exercise, a summary of calories burned and duration, and a visual representation of workout intensity zones (Zone 1-5) using color-coded gradients.

screens.title: Onboarding
screens.description: A multi-step introduction to the app's core features, designed to engage users immediately upon installation.
screens.prompt: Create a sleek Onboarding flow with three distinct slides: 'Track Your Vitals', 'Analyze Your Sleep', and 'Optimize Your Performance'. Each slide should feature a large, animated icon or abstract 3D shape representing the feature, set against a dark background with subtle neon green glows.

screens.title: Sign In / Sign Up
screens.description: A secure and accessible authentication interface supporting biometric login and strong password entry.
screens.prompt: Design a secure Sign In/Sign Up interface featuring a biometric login button (FaceID simulation), a password strength meter with visual feedback, and a floating glassmorphic input field design with neon focus states.

screens.title: Profile Settings
screens.description: A user management interface for personal data, device connections, and application preferences.
screens.prompt: Design a Profile Settings screen with a large profile avatar, editable fields for personal data, a list of connected devices (smartwatch, scale), and toggle switches for notification preferences, all styled with the glassmorphic dark theme.
